moments.title: World Cup 2026 Final: Spain vs Argentina
moments.blurb: Spain takes on Argentina in the highly anticipated FIFA World Cup 2026 Final today, kicking off at 8 PM BST from MetLife Stadium in New Jersey.

angles.name: World Cup Final excitement
angles.copy: The biggest game in football is HERE! Spain vs Argentina for the World Cup trophy tonight. Who are you backing?

angles.name: Sunday Football Drama
angles.copy: World Cup Final Sunday! Get ready for 90 minutes (or more!) of pure drama as Spain and Argentina go head-to-head.

moments.title: The Open Championship Final Day
moments.blurb: The final round of the 154th Open Championship concludes today at Royal Birkdale, with the world's best golfers battling for the Claret Jug.

angles.name: Open Championship climax
angles.copy: It all comes down to this! Who will lift the Claret Jug at Royal Birkdale today? Last day of The Open Championship.

angles.name: Golf Sunday drama
angles.copy: Sunday drama on the links! The Open Championship reaches its thrilling conclusion today. Who's your pick for Champion Golfer of the Year?

moments.title: Happy 79th Birthday, Brian May!
moments.blurb: Legendary Queen guitarist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday today, July 19.

angles.name: Brian May tribute
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the one and only Brian May! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

angles.name: Queen's guitar legend
angles.copy: Sending birthday wishes to rock royalty, Brian May! 79 today and still rocking. What's his most iconic riff for you?

moments.title: Happy 79th Birthday, Bernie Leadon!
moments.blurb: Founding Eagles member and multi-instrumentalist Bernie Leadon turns 79 today, July 19, known for his country-rock influence on the band's early sound.

angles.name: Eagles founding member
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to Bernie Leadon, a founding member of the Eagles! Which classic track do you think he influenced most?

angles.name: Country-rock pioneer
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to Bernie Leadon! His guitar and banjo helped shape the iconic sound of the Eagles.

moments.title: Happy 85th Birthday, Vikki Carr!
moments.blurb: American singer Vikki Carr, known for her soulful pop standards and Latin ballads like 'It Must Be Him,' celebrates her 85th birthday today, July 19.

angles.name: Vikki Carr birthday
angles.copy: Happy 85th Birthday to the incredible Vikki Carr! Her voice on 'It Must Be Him' is timeless. What's your favourite Vikki Carr song?

angles.name: Soulful pop legend
angles.copy: Wishing a wonderful 85th birthday to the legendary Vikki Carr! Still enchanting audiences with her soulful sound.

moments.title: Happy 80th Birthday, Alan Gorrie!
moments.blurb: Alan Gorrie, co-founder of the Scottish funk and R&B group Average White Band, celebrates his 80th birthday today, July 19.

angles.name: Average White Band founder
angles.copy: Happy 80th Birthday to Alan Gorrie of the Average White Band! Still grooving after all these years. What's your favourite AWB track?

angles.name: Scottish funk legend
angles.copy: Sending birthday wishes to Scottish funk legend Alan Gorrie, 80 today! 'Pick Up the Pieces' still sounds incredible.

moments.title: Official Singles Chart update
moments.blurb: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean hold the top spot with 'Rein Me In' on the Official Singles Chart (July 16-22), while Oasis's 'Wonderwall' surges to Number 2 and Three Lions re-enters the Top 10.

angles.name: Chart topper
angles.copy: Still at Number 1! Sam Fender & Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' reigns supreme on the Official Singles Chart. Is it your favourite?

angles.name: Football anthems chart surge
angles.copy: Footie fever hits the charts! Oasis's 'Wonderwall' is at Number 2 and 'Three Lions' roars back into the Top 10!

moments.title: Summer holidays begin for many UK schools
moments.blurb: The summer school holidays begin for many pupils in Scotland (July 21) and England (July 23) this week, joining Wales where holidays started in June.

angles.name: School's Out for Summer
angles.copy: Freedom! Many schools in England and Scotland break up for summer this week. Who's counting down the hours?

angles.name: Summer break plans
angles.copy: Summer holidays are officially here for thousands of kids across the UK! What are your plans for the long break?

moments.title: Glasgow readies for Commonwealth Games
moments.blurb: The 2026 Commonwealth Games kick off in Glasgow this Thursday, July 23, with over 3,000 athletes from 74 nations competing across 11 days.

angles.name: Commonwealth Games countdown
angles.copy: The Commonwealth Games are almost here! Glasgow gets ready to host thousands of athletes from Thursday. Who's excited for the opening ceremony?

angles.name: Summer of sport
angles.copy: Get set for a summer of sport! Glasgow hosts the Commonwealth Games starting July 23. What events are you most looking forward to?

moments.title: Latitude Festival kicks off this week
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival returns to Henham Park, Suffolk, from July 23-26, celebrating its 20th anniversary with headliners David Byrne, Teddy Swims, and Lewis Capaldi.

angles.name: Latitude Festival excitement
angles.copy: Sun's out, wellies on! Latitude Festival is back at Henham Park from Thursday. Who's heading to Suffolk for the music and comedy?

angles.name: 20 years of Latitude
angles.copy: Latitude celebrates 20 years this week! David Byrne, Teddy Swims & Lewis Capaldi lead a huge lineup. What's your must-see act?

moments.title: Happy 61st Birthday, Slash!
moments.blurb: Guns N' Roses guitar icon Slash turns 61 this Wednesday, July 23.

angles.name: Slash tribute
angles.copy: Happy 61st Birthday to the top hat-wearing guitar god, Slash! What's his most unforgettable solo?

angles.name: Guns N' Roses icon
angles.copy: Wishing a rockin' happy 61st birthday to Slash! Pick your favourite Guns N' Roses anthem to celebrate.

moments.title: Happy 46th Birthday, Michelle Williams!
moments.blurb: Destiny's Child star Michelle Williams celebrates her 46th birthday this Wednesday, July 23.

angles.name: Michelle Williams birthday
angles.copy: Happy 46th Birthday to Michelle Williams! From Destiny's Child to solo success, what's your favourite of her tracks?

angles.name: Destiny's Child star
angles.copy: Wishing a fabulous 46th birthday to Michelle Williams! Time to crank up some Destiny's Child classics!

moments.title: Happy 79th Birthday, David Essex!
moments.blurb: British singer and actor David Essex, known for hits like 'Rock On' and his musical roles, turns 79 this Wednesday, July 23.

angles.name: David Essex tribute
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to British legend David Essex! What's your favourite song from his incredible career?

angles.name: Rock On star
angles.copy: Wishing a wonderful 79th birthday to David Essex! Still 'Rock On'-ing after all these years.

moments.title: Happy 55th Birthday, Alison Krauss!
moments.blurb: Award-winning American bluegrass-country singer Alison Krauss celebrates her 55th birthday this Wednesday, July 23.

angles.name: Alison Krauss birthday
angles.copy: Happy 55th Birthday to the immensely talented Alison Krauss! Her voice is pure magic. What's your favourite of her songs?

angles.name: Bluegrass queen
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 55th birthday to the incredible Alison Krauss! A true queen of bluegrass and country.

moments.title: Happy 65th Birthday, Martin Gore!
moments.blurb: Depeche Mode co-founder and chief songwriter Martin Gore turns 65 this Wednesday, July 23.

angles.name: Martin Gore tribute
angles.copy: Happy 65th Birthday to the genius behind Depeche Mode's sound, Martin Gore! What's your favourite DM track he wrote?

angles.name: Depeche Mode songwriter
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 65th birthday to Martin Gore! The synth-pop pioneer still shapes the sound of Depeche Mode.

moments.title: Happy 53rd Birthday, Fran Healy!
moments.blurb: Travis frontman and songwriter Fran Healy celebrates his 53rd birthday this Wednesday, July 23.

angles.name: Fran Healy birthday
angles.copy: Happy 53rd Birthday to Travis's brilliant frontman, Fran Healy! What's your go-to Travis song?

angles.name: Voice of Travis
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 53rd birthday to Fran Healy! The voice of Travis still sounds as good as ever.

moments.title: T100 Triathlon hits London
moments.blurb: The T100 Triathlon, featuring world-class athletes, takes place in London this coming weekend, July 25-26.

angles.name: London triathlon
angles.copy: Swim, bike, run! The T100 Triathlon brings elite athletes to London this weekend. Who's brave enough to give it a go?

angles.name: World class sport in London
angles.copy: London calling all triathlon fans! The T100 series is in town Saturday & Sunday. Will you be cheering on from the sidelines?
